zh.title: 基于代码事实生成 AI Skill 的分层验证方法
zh.description: 这套方法用于从真实代码事实出发，定义可核验边界，再构建业务事实目录、事实边界和 Skill，实现可追溯的工程交付判断。
zh.cardDescription: 先把事实抽出来再定 Skill，避免在业务事实未定义前进入模型优化。
zh.scenario: 适用于已有业务系统里接入 AI 能力的场景，用于在模型调参前先把代码事实、事实边界与输出标准梳理清楚。

notes.whyExists: 很多 AI 项目先把重点放在模型与提示词优化，导致在事实薄弱时反复试错。该方法用于先把业务事实边界稳定下来，再决定是否进入下游建模。
notes.whatProblemItSolves: 它将“模型问题”“协议问题”“工程问题”“标准答案问题”“事实定义问题”从结果层面拆开，让团队先对齐证据，再讨论优化方向。
notes.howIUseIt: 我先确认代码入口、核心对象、关键问题和输出协议，再走业务对象识别、事实抽取、事实目录与边界判断、Skill 草案与标准样本草案，最后用失败归因判断是否转入下一阶段。
notes.whyItStayed: 在复用场景中它长期有效，能显著减少基于猜测的讨论，并提升团队对事实定义与验收边界的一致性。
notes.whyItChanged: 已从“先改提示词、再追求分数”调整为“先建立事实边界，再决定是否进入模型优化”。
notes.whenNotToUseIt: 当你只是想快速尝试一次性文本生成、或问题本身并非围绕代码事实建立 AI 能力时，不建议直接套用该方法。

zh.prompt:
## 这是什么

这是一套用于从代码事实出发建立 AI Skill 的方法论。它面向 Tech Lead 和 AI 工程判断者，目标是确认某一层 Skill 是否建立在真实的业务事实上，而不是在缺失证据的情况下直接优化模型。

## 适用场景

1. 已有业务系统希望接入 AI 问答，但没有稳定的事实边界。
2. 希望在 Text-to-SQL 之前建立一层可复用的语义事实层。
3. 需要从代码中抽取业务事实，生成事实目录与事实边界。
4. 需要输出 Skill 草案与标准样本。
5. 需要区分模型问题、工程问题、标准答案问题与事实定义问题。

## 核心原则

1. 不先问“如何让模型更准”，先问“代码里真实存在什么业务事实”。
2. 字段本身不等于业务事实。
3. Skill 是代码事实的语义封装，不是一般性的 Prompt 技巧。
4. 标准样本命中率高不等于业务正确。

## 方法流程

1. 代码审查
2. 业务对象识别
3. 业务动作 / 状态 / 规则抽取
4. 可查询或可判断事实抽象
5. 业务事实目录草案
6. 业务事实边界表
7. Skill 草案
8. 标准样本草案
9. 模型与执行链路评测
10. 标准答案审查
11. 失败归因
12. 收口或进入下一阶段

## 失败归因

- JSON 通过率低：排查响应协议与输出结构。
- 协议字段有效性低：检查字段命名、类型与约束。
- 规则失控高：排查 no-think / JSON-only 行为失效。
- 语义方向正确性低：确认事实语义边界是否清晰。
- 标准样本命中但人工不认同：标准答案可能有问题。
- 歧义点过多：可能是业务事实定义缺口，而非模型推理问题。
- SQL / 字段名泄漏：说明层级边界未分离干净。

## 配套执行 Prompt

本方法对应的可复制 Codex 执行 Prompt 独立维护在：
- 中文：/business-fact-review-codex-prompt/（业务事实审查 Codex Prompt）
- English: /en/business-fact-review-codex-prompt/（Business Fact Review Codex Prompt）

## 来源说明

该方法来自企业级业务问答场景的实战经验。模型对比和实验参数仅作为背景，不是方法使用前置条件；可复用的是“先证据后建模、再用失败归因收口”的执行路径。
zh.exampleInput:
背景：目标层级为 {{TARGET_LAYER}}，已确认代码入口为 {{CODE_ENTRY_POINTS}}，并希望沉淀可复用的 AI Skill。
请先给出该层的业务对象识别、代码事实抽取与事实边界判断，再决定是否进入 Skill 草案与标准样本阶段。
zh.exampleOutput:
先确认是否有足够代码证据定义业务对象与动作；
再输出业务事实目录草案与业务事实边界表；
仅在事实与协议边界清晰时推进 Skill 草案，后续以失败归因确认是否进入下一阶段。
zh.usage:
1. 先按方法论梳理当前问题是否属于事实定义、规范判断或模型优化前置阶段。
2. 先定义业务对象、规则、状态边界与输出协议。
3. 仅在事实边界稳定后，再启动配套的
   业务事实审查 Codex Prompt。
4. 对于模型、标准答案或工程争议，优先按失败归因闭环归类。

en.title: Code-Fact-to-Skill Methodology
en.description: A methodology for extracting verifiable code facts, defining fact boundaries, and building AI Skills in a layered, auditable way before model-level changes.
en.cardDescription: Start from code evidence, then shape fact boundaries and Skill design before model tuning.
en.scenario: Useful when an existing business system already has code context and the team needs a disciplined fact-first path before any model optimization.

notes.whyExists: Most projects start with prompts and models, then discover instability because facts were never defined. This method restores a fact-first sequence and keeps decisions auditable.
notes.whatProblemItSolves: It separates model, protocol, engineering, gold-set, and fact-definition failures, so teams stop confusing score tuning with missing business facts.
notes.howIUseIt: I confirm entry points, target layer, key objects, known questions, and output protocol, then move through business object review, fact extraction, fact catalog and boundary checks, and then draft Skill and gold set.
notes.whyItStayed: In repeated use cases, it keeps discussions anchored to evidence and reduces speculative model-level tuning before foundation facts are stable.
notes.whyItChanged: The flow is now stage-gated around fact and protocol boundaries, replacing direct prompt or score optimization as the default first step.
notes.whenNotToUseIt: Do not use it for one-off creative drafting when there is no shared code-grounded context and no need for fact-governed Skill design.

en.prompt:
## What this is

This is a methodology for building AI Skills from code facts. It is for Tech Leads and engineering decision makers to judge whether a layer skill can be grounded on real business facts before model optimization.

## When to use

1. The business system already has code context and AI capability plans.
2. You need a semantic layer before Text-to-SQL.
3. You need to extract business facts from code and define fact boundaries.
4. You need outputs for Fact Catalog, Fact Boundary, Skill draft, and Gold Set draft.
5. You want to separate model, engineering, gold-set, and fact-definition issues.

## Core principles

1. Do not ask first how to make the model more precise; ask what real business facts are proven by code.
2. A field name is not the same as a business fact.
3. A Skill is a semantic wrapper of code facts, not a generic Prompt trick.
4. High hit rate of samples does not automatically mean business correctness.

## Method flow

1. Code review
2. Business object identification
3. Extraction of business actions, states, and rules
4. Abstraction of queryable or judgeable facts
5. Draft of fact catalog
6. Fact boundary table
7. Skill draft
8. Draft Gold Set
9. Model and execution-path evaluation
10. Gold review
11. Failure Attribution
12. Close or move to next stage

## Failure attribution

- JSON pass rate is low: check protocol control and response structure first.
- Protocol validity is low: check schema consistency, field names, and types.
- Control drift is high: no-think / JSON-only behavior is unstable.
- Semantic direction is off: fact boundaries or skill goals are drifting.
- Gold set hits but business is not right: gold answers may have issues.
- Too much ambiguity: this may come from fact-definition gaps, not model reasoning.
- SQL or field leakage: layer boundary was not cleanly separated.

## Paired execution prompt

The executable Codex prompt for this method is maintained separately: 
- Chinese: /business-fact-review-codex-prompt/ (Business Fact Review Codex Prompt)
- English: /en/business-fact-review-codex-prompt/ (Business Fact Review Codex Prompt)

## Origin notes

This method comes from enterprise AI Q&A practice. Model comparisons and benchmark settings are historical context only; the reusable part is the fact-first sequence and failure attribution closure.
en.exampleInput:
Context: target layer is {{TARGET_LAYER}}, code entry points are {{CODE_ENTRY_POINTS}}, and we need to prepare a reusable AI Skill.
Please first define business object review, fact review, catalog draft, and boundary checks before moving on.
en.exampleOutput:
Start by confirming business objects and code evidence.
Then produce fact catalog and fact boundary definitions.
Only proceed to Skill draft and Gold Set draft after fact and protocol boundaries are stable.
en.usage:
1. Use this as a design method page, not as a direct execution prompt.
2. Clarify the input objects, layer boundaries, and protocol constraints first.
3. Run the paired executable entry Business Fact Review Codex Prompt only after the fact boundary is stable.
4. Make next-stage decisions based on failure attribution categories (model, protocol, engineering, answer quality, or fact definition).
